name: @daviseford/def
description: CLI that orchestrates turn-based debates between Claude Code and Codex, then implements and reviews changes

scripts.test: tsx --test src/__tests__/context.test.ts src/__tests__/heartbeat.test.ts src/__tests__/history.test.ts src/__tests__/ipc.test.ts src/__tests__/normalizeStatus.test.ts src/__tests__/pr.test.ts src/__tests__/recovery.test.ts src/__tests__/recovery-finalize.test.ts src/__tests__/registry.test.ts src/__tests__/server-metadata.test.ts src/__tests__/server-multisession.test.ts src/__tests__/tier.test.ts src/__tests__/trace.test.ts src/__tests__/util.test.ts src/__tests__/validate.test.ts src/__tests__/worktree.test.ts
scripts.prepublishOnly: npm run build && npm run build:ui && node scripts/copy-ui-dist.js

author: daviseford
